query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '[IVXivx]+ [-–]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as artefatos_inciso,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '§ [0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as artefatos_paragrafo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean REGEXP '^(Contribuinte deve|É vedado)' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as prefixo_inadequado,
  SUM(CASE WHEN question_text_clean LIKE '%?' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_interrogacao,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(question_text_clean) BETWEEN 30 AND 600 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as legivel
FROM requirement_question_mapping;
